records.ety: [OF. losengier, losengeor, fr. losengier to deceive, flatter, losenge, flattery, Pr. lauzenga, fr. L. laus praise. Cf. Lozenge.]

defs: A flatterer; a deceiver; a cozener.
quotes: To a fair pair of gallows, there to end their lives with shame, as a number of such other losengers had done.
